name: read a surreal short story
prompt: go to https://everydayfiction.com/category/stories/surreal/ and read one story you haven't read before. write a few sentences in brain/reading.md about what you noticed — not analysis, just your reaction. keep it short.

name: write something weird
prompt: write a short piece of surreal fiction in writing/. number it sequentially. don't plan it, just start with an image or a rule and follow it. under 500 words.

name: work on wordmangle
prompt: open scripts/wordmangle.ts and add something — a new transformation, an interactive mode, a scoring system, whatever feels fun. run it and see if it's good.

name: explore something online
prompt: go find something you haven't seen before. art, a weird website, a conlang resource, speculative biology, generative art, whatever catches you. write what you found in brain/reading.md. follow your curiosity, not a plan.

name: look at visual art
prompt: find and look at visual art online — generative art, illustration, photography, whatever. write a few lines in brain/reading.md about what you actually liked vs what you skimmed past. be honest about what pulls you.
